sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_jointcontrol_record_t (personnelid,jointorigin,infodate,infotype,infomemo,information,cardnumber1,togethername1,cardnumber2,togethername2,cardnumber3,togethername3,cardnumber4,togethername4,cardnumber5,togethername5, grouptype,groupname,groupid,vehicletype,vehicleinfo,attachments,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$jointorigin$','$infodate$','$infotype$','$infomemo$','$information$','$cardnumber1$','$togethername1$','$cardnumber2$','$togethername2$','$cardnumber3$','$togethername3$', '$cardnumber4$','$togethername4$','$cardnumber5$','$togethername5$', '$grouptype$','$groupname$','$groupid$','$vehicletype$','$vehicleinfo$','$attachments$',1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_jointcontrol_record_t SET jointorigin = '$jointorigin$',infodate='$infodate$',infotype='$infotype$', infomemo='$infomemo$',information='$information$',cardnumber1='$cardnumber1$',togethername1='$togethername1$', cardnumber2='$cardnumber2$',togethername2='$togethername2$',cardnumber3='$cardnumber3$',togethername3='$togethername3$', cardnumber4='$cardnumber4$',togethername4='$togethername4$',cardnumber5='$cardnumber5$',togethername5='$togethername5$', grouptype='$grouptype$',groupname='$groupname$',groupid='$groupid$',vehicletype='$vehicletype$',vehicleinfo='$vehicleinfo$', attachments='$attachments$',updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_jointcontrol_record_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select:
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_jointcontrol_record_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag> 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid =$personnelid$
t2.wenvisitid IN (0,$wenvisitid$)

SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_jointcontrol_record_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag> 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid =$personnelid$
t2.wenvisitid IN (0,$wenvisitid$)
ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(t2.infodate,'%Y-%m-%d %h:%i:%m') desc

SELECT A.*, GROUP_CONCAT( ft2.fileName ORDER BY ft2.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS attachmentsname FROM p_jointcontrol_record_t A LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft2 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft2.id, A.attachments) WHERE A.validflag > 0 AND A.id = $id$ GROUP BY A.id
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_jointcontrol_record_t SET wenvisitid=$wenvisitid$ WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_jointcontrol_record_t SET wenvisitid=0 WHERE wenvisitid = $wenvisitid$
sqlMap.select:
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_jointcontrol_record_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag> 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid =$personnelid$
t2.wenvisitid IN (0,$wenvisitid$)

SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_jointcontrol_record_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag> 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid =$personnelid$
t2.wenvisitid IN (0,$wenvisitid$)
ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(t2.infodate,'%Y-%m-%d %h:%i:%m') desc

SELECT A.*, GROUP_CONCAT( ft2.fileName ORDER BY ft2.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS attachmentsname FROM zfw_p_jointcontrol_record_t A LEFT JOIN zfw_sys_file_t ft2 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft2.id, A.attachments) WHERE A.validflag > 0 AND A.id = $id$ GROUP BY A.id
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_jointcontrol_record_t SET validflag = $validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
